title: PolyLib
description: A Minecraft lib used for all of CreeperHosts mods
body:
"PolyLib," developed by CreeperHost Ltd., is a compact Minecraft library mod focused on providing a collection of helper classes. These classes are designed to simplify various aspects of mod development, offering tools for easier GUI creation and other development enhancements to improve efficiency and user experience.

PolyLib is built using Architectury and is available for NeoForge, Forge, and Fabric.

PolyLib is Open source and available on Github.

Mods that require PolyLib

  • SoulShards
  • BlockShot
  • MineTogether
